rationale: Educ. Code §12.053 governs cooperative campus charter petitions by parents and teachers. It contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or school funding formulas affected by exemption amounts.
quote: The board of trustees may grant a charter to parents and teachers at two or more campuses in the district for a cooperative charter program
_note: No conflict. §12.053 is procedurally unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
